expectations.text: Response installs react-grab as dev dependency
expectations.evidence: Shows 'npm install -D react-grab' command and notes 'Installing as a dev dependency keeps it out of your production dependency manifest.'

expectations.text: Response uses import.meta.env.DEV for Vite dev-only check
expectations.evidence: Both Option A (index.html) and Option B (src/main.tsx) use 'if (import.meta.env.DEV) { import("react-grab"); }'. Explains 'Vite replaces import.meta.env.DEV with a boolean at build time.'

expectations.text: Response adds script in index.html before </head>
expectations.evidence: Option A shows 'Add a script tag in your index.html before </head>' with the script block containing import.meta.env.DEV guard.

expectations.text: Response confirms react-grab is excluded from production builds
expectations.evidence: Section 4 'Confirm it is excluded from production' instructs to run 'npm run build' and inspect dist/ to verify no references to react-grab are present. Explains Vite's build process eliminates it entirely.
